pokemon:zweilous.name: Zweilous
pokemon:zweilous.summary: After it has eaten up all the food in its territory, it moves to another area. Its two heads do not get along.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: After it has eaten up all the food in its territory, it moves to another area. Its two heads do not get along.
After it has eaten up all the food in its territory, it moves to another area. Its two heads do not get along.
The two heads do not get along. Whichever head eats more than the other gets to be the leader.
The two heads do not get along. Whichever head eats more than the other gets to be the leader.
Their two heads will fight each other over a single piece of food. Zweilous are covered in scars even without battling others.
While hunting for prey, Zweilous wanders its territory, its two heads often bickering over which way to go.
Since their two heads do not get along and compete with each other for food, they always eat too much.
The two heads do not get along. Whichever head eats more than the other gets to be the leader.
The two heads do not get along. Whichever head eats more than the other gets to be the leader.
After it has eaten up all the food in its territory, it moves to another area. Its two heads do not get along.

pokemon:deino.name: Deino
pokemon:deino.summary: Lacking sight, it’s unaware of its surroundings, so it bumps into things and eats anything that moves.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Lacking sight, it’s unaware of its surroundings, so it bumps into things and eats anything that moves.
It tends to bite everything, and it is not a picky eater. Approaching it carelessly is dangerous.
Lacking sight, it’s unaware of its surroundings, so it bumps into things and eats anything that moves.
They cannot see, so they tackle and bite to learn about their surroundings. Their bodies are covered in wounds.
Because it can’t see, this Pokémon is constantly biting at everything it touches, trying to keep track of its surroundings.
When it encounters something, its first urge is usually to bite it. If it likes what it tastes, it will commit the associated scent to memory.
They cannot see, so they tackle and bite to learn about their surroundings. Their bodies are covered in wounds.
Lacking sight, it’s unaware of its surroundings, so it bumps into things and eats anything that moves.
They cannot see, so they tackle and bite to learn about their surroundings. Their bodies are covered in wounds.
Lacking sight, it’s unaware of its surroundings, so it bumps into things and eats anything that moves.

pokemon:hydreigon.name: Hydreigon
pokemon:hydreigon.summary: It responds to movement by attacking. This scary, three-headed Pokémon devours everything in its path!
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It responds to movement by attacking. This scary, three-headed Pokémon devours everything in its path!
This brutal Pokémon travels the skies on its six wings. Anything that moves seems like a foe to it, triggering its attack.
It responds to movement by attacking. This scary, three-headed Pokémon devours everything in its path!
The heads on their arms do not have brains. They use all three heads to consume and destroy everything.
The three heads take turns sinking their teeth into the opponent. Their attacks won’t slow until their target goes down.
There are a slew of stories about villages that were destroyed by Hydreigon. It bites anything that moves.
The heads on their arms do not have brains. They use all three heads to consume and destroy everything.
It responds to movement by attacking. This scary, three-headed Pokémon devours everything in its path!
The heads on their arms do not have brains. They use all three heads to consume and destroy everything.
